author: barnabasbusa
content: I’m testing it in kt and expecting to launch in a few hours once ELs confirmed to be working

author: tbenr
content:
i believe teku-reth-1 is off cose reth is rejecting payloads. in particular we restarted and we got a rejection on https://dora.glamsterdam-devnet-5.ethpandaops.io/slot/115780
will try to restart reth

author: tersec
content: ok, if Reth is rejecting payloads, can this be checked if it's fake invalids or real invalids?

author: tersec
content: fake invalids are nearly the worst thing an EL can do, especially in Glamsterdam where EMPTY is ok but parent == INVALID kills the chain

author: tbenr
content: they are canonical. so i assume they are invalid

author: tersec
content: ok, important Reth issue if so

author: draganrakita
content: I have resynced reth recently with lighthouse, up to block `105698` as there were some reports of gas mismatch of past block but it passed without problem

author: tbenr
content: I restarted reth and apparently now we are catching up

author: tbenr
content: sorry the reason for which we were stuck on 115780 is because "Invalid ExecutionPayload: links to previously rejected block" so one of its ancestors was considered invalid from reth

author: tersec
content: are there logs of this happening still available, if someone from Reth were to find themselves inclined towards investigating this? (and yes, I view this as important enough I'm meddling in a non-Nimbus concern here, I understand)

author: tbenr
content: i believe they are. Someone from reth can take a look if that thing is still relevant
